This proposal is valid for 180 days from the date of submission. 

*This response includes data that must not be disclosed outside the Government and must not be duplicated, used, or disclosed – in whole or in part – for any purpose other than to evaluate this submission. This restriction does not limit the Government's right to use information contained in this data if it is obtained from another source without restriction.
